<!--
PR title must follow Conventional Commits — it becomes the squash-merge commit message
and feeds release-please. Examples:

  feat: add player ban duration field
  fix: prevent RCON reconnect loop on auth failure
  docs: clarify Windows code-signing setup
  chore: bump tauri to 2.1.4
  refactor: extract polling scheduler

Use `feat!:` or include `BREAKING CHANGE:` for breaking changes.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- 1-3 sentences. Why, not just what. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #42 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] Manually smoke-tested against a live server (note which server type)
- [ ] Screenshots attached if this changes UI
- [ ] No new dependencies added without flagging in the description

## Screenshots / GIFs

<!-- Drop them here if the PR touches UI. Before/after if it's a redesign. -->

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky, anything you're unsure about, anything you want a second opinion on. -->
